mapper.select: select count(*) from category where name = #{name} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into category(name, description, sort_order,book_count,status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) values (#{name}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{bookCount}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.select: select id, name, description, sort_order, book_count, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from category order by sort_order desc
select id, name, description, sort_order from category where status = 1 and is_deleted = 0 order by sort_order desc
select id, name, description, sort_order, book_count, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from category where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update category set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
